welcome.title: Welcome to AjoLedger
welcome.body: We dey upgrade community savings with transparency, trust, and simplicity — we no dey change the Ajo tradition wey you don sabi.

recorded.title: Every Payment. E Dey Record By Itself.
recorded.body: No more spreadsheet or receipt wahala. Every contribution go record by itself, so you fit see your savings clear-clear anytime.

confidence.title: Track Your Savings With Confidence.
confidence.body: Know your contribution status, payout wey dey come, and savings progress — all inside one simple dashboard wey everybody fit use.

auth.createAccessPasscodeSubtitle: You go use this passcode open the app.
auth.enterAccessPasscodeSubtitle: Enter your 6-digit access passcode make you continue.
auth.forgetPasscodeBody: Dem go sign you out. You go need sign in with your email and password to set new passcode.
auth.enterPinSubtitle: Enter your 4-digit PIN make you continue.
auth.createPinSubtitle: You go use dis PIN for important actions.
auth.socialComingSoonBody: Google and Apple sign-in go ready when backend don set.

errors.weakPassword: Password must reach 8 characters. Try again.
errors.accessPasscodeLength: Passcode must reach 6 digits. Try again.
errors.passcodeLockedOut: Too many tries. Try again in {{seconds}} seconds.
errors.googleNotConfigured: Google sign-in never configure yet. Add Google OAuth client IDs to your .env and rebuild the app, or use email and password.
errors.googleRequiresDevBuild: Google sign-in need development build. Use email and password for Expo Go, or press s for dev client.

home.totalDueSubtitle: Aggregated urgent liability across all active group

errors.generic: Something go wrong. Abeg try again.

home.comingSoonBody: This screen go dey available for future update.

contributionReminder.title: Contribution reminder
contributionReminder.subtitle: Your next contribution due next week

bankDetails.title: Input Your Account details
bankDetails.subtitle: This account go be where you go receive your contribution payout
bankDetails.profileHint: Enter your 4-digit transaction PIN to save payout bank changes.

errors.resolveRequired: Verify your account before you continue.
errors.resolveFailed: Account details no fit resolve. Try again.
errors.banksLoadFailed: No fit load banks. Try again.
errors.banksUnavailable: Bank list no dey available yet. Try again.

firstTime.heroMessage: Create or join savings group make you start dey save with your community

secure.title: Secure & Transparent
secure.body: Every payment dey recorded and safe

informed.title: Stay Informed
informed.body: Get reminders and updates every time

join.title: Join a Group
join.subtitle: Join existing savings with invitation code

create.title: Create a Group
create.subtitle: Create your own savings group for your community

help.title: Need Help?
help.subtitle: We dey here to help you every step of the way

bankRequired.title: Add payout bank first
bankRequired.body: You need bank account where you go receive your Ajo payout before you fit join or create group.

empty.headline: Reach goals faster, together.
empty.message: Join invite-only savings group or start your own Ajo with people wey you trust

create.title: Create savings group
create.descriptionPlaceholder: Wetin dis group dey save for?

errors.nameLength: Group name must be between 3 and 100 characters.
errors.descriptionLength: Description must be 500 characters or fewer.

list.heading: Your groups
list.memberBadge: You join dis group as member

payoutOrder.title: Payout Order
payoutOrder.assignBody: Tap members one by one to set the order dem go collect dia payout.
payoutOrder.incompleteBody: Tap every member to set dia payout turn before you start contribution.
payoutOrder.adminOnlyBody: Only di group creator fit assign payout order.
payoutOrder.successBody: Turns don save and contribution cycle don start.
payoutOrder.memberUnassignedA11y: {{name}}, not assigned. Tap to set next turn.

join.title: Enter Code
join.subtitle: Enter di invitation code wey your group admin share

detail.title: Group
detail.payInBody: Transfer your contribution go dis dedicated account.
detail.accountPending: Your group account dey setup. Check back later.

ledger.title: Ledger
ledger.waitingForPayment: Dey wait make dem confirm payment…
ledger.paymentTimedOut: Still dey process. Pull down refresh or try again later.
ledger.payoutComingSoon: Payout go dey available for future update.

payout.title: Payout
payout.noRecipient: Nobody don dey assigned to collect payout yet.
payout.waitingForContributions: We dey wait make every member pay for dis round.
payout.emptySchedule: Set payout order to see di schedule.
payout.pinBody: Enter your 4-digit transaction PIN to send dis payout.
payout.initiatedBody: Transfer dey process. Dis screen go update when di round move.
payout.disburseFailed: We no fit start payout. Check your PIN and try again.
payout.pollTimedOut: E still dey process. Pull down to refresh or check again.

profile.title: Profile
profile.logoutMessage: You sure say you wan log out?

biometrics.notAvailableBody: This device no support fingerprint or Face ID.
biometrics.notEnrolledBody: Add fingerprint or Face ID for your device settings, then try again.

editPhoto.title: Edit Profile Picture
editPhoto.permissionBody: Allow camera or photo library access make you fit update your profile picture.
editPhoto.webUnavailable: Photo capture no dey work for web for this demo.
editPhoto.updateFailed: We no fit update your profile picture. Try again.

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.intro: If you delete your account, e go permanent and you no fit undo am. All your data and access go disappear. Help us improve — tell us why you dey leave.

reasons.notUsingApp: I no dey use the app again
reasons.doesntMeetNeeds: The app no meet my needs
reasons.switchingService: I dey switch to another service

lastChance.lead: We don verify your account and we go proceed with deletion.
lastChance.body: This na your last chance to cancel. You no go fit recover your account once e delete, and you go need create new account if you wan come back.
lastChance.question: You sure say you wan delete your account?

otp.title: Verify your identity
otp.body: For security, enter the 6-digit code we send to {{email}}

deactivated.title: Account Deactivated
deactivated.body: Your AjoLedger account don schedule for deletion. E go permanently remove in 14 days.
deactivated.footer:
If you change your mind, just log in again before then to reactivate your account.

We hope to see you back soon.

reactivate.title: Account deactivated
reactivate.body: Your account don deactivate. Reactivate to continue with AjoLedger.

phone.title: Phone Support
phone.callFailedBody: Your device no fit open phone app. Try again or use email support.

confirmation.title: Message Sent!
confirmation.body: Thank you for reaching out. We go get back to you at <highlight>{{email}}</highlight> within 24 hours.

voice.readAloud: Make phone read am for you
